title: Safego W5W LED Bulb 501 T10 LED Bulbs CANBUS Error Free Car Light Super Bright White 5SMD 5050 194 168 2825 Wedge Replacement for Car Interior Dashboard License Plate Sidelights Bulbs 12V 10PCS
features: 【SUPER BRIGHT 501 LED BULBS】Each W5W 501 T10 Car LED bulb is made of 5 pcs super bright 5050 LED Chipsets. Color: White. Long Lifespan: ＞50,000. Color temperature: 6000K~6500K. Working Voltage: 12V DC. Much brighter than halogen bulbs.
【LONG LIFETIME】Low Power Consumption, energy saving. Good heat dissipation, High Temperature Resistance, long service life Up to 50,000 hours.

【WIDE APPLICATION】W5W/501/T10 LED Bulbs fit numerous vehicle applications, such as Car Interior (Map, Dome, Cargo, Courtesy) Lights, Side Lights, Instrument Cluster Lights, Gauge Lights, Dashboard Lights, Indicator Lights, Number Plate Lights, Vanity Lights, Parking Lights, Signal Lights, and Glove Box Lights, etc.

【NOTICE】This item is CANBUS led bulbs, it fits almost european cars, but may be doestn't work on the new European cars & High-end Luxury with OBC wiring system. If you have any questions or dissatisfaction, please feel free to contact us, we will reply you within 24 hours and give you a satisfactory solution.
description: 501 W5W T10 LED Bulb CANBUS Super Bright White for Car Interior/ Exterior Light Bulbs W5W LED Bulb Specification: Type: Car Interior Exterior Lamp Voltage: 12V DC Bulb type: T10 Wedge (W5W) Lamp Type: 5050 SMD LED quantity: 5 SMD LED Color: White Color Temperature: 6000K~6500K Life Span: 30,000 hours. Low heat production for longer lifespan. Note: use for car/auto with 12V DC, not suitable for 24V vehilce. Package Includes: 10 x W5W LED Bulbs 1 year warranty (used in normal condition) W5W/501/T10 LED Bulbs Application: 12V Car LED bulbs, Dash/ dashboard (gauge cluster light), LED instrument light, side maker lamp, tail light (rear light bulb), stop light, parking light, position lamp bulbs or license plate light(number plate light), LED reading light, LED turn signal light lamp, LED indicator light, LED courtesy light, trunk lights bulbs. T10 - Cross Reference W5W (194 168) 147 152 158 159 161 168 184 192 193 194 259 280 285 447 464 501 555 558 585 655 656 657 1250 1251 1252 2450 2652 2921 2825 504 2821 Features: 1.Low Power Consumption, energy saving. 2.Faster on/off response time. 3.Long-lasting, up to 30,000 hours. 4.Good heat dissipation, High Temperature Resistance,Rust Resistance,Bump Resistance, vivid color. 5.Protect the eye-sight, no strobe, no radiate, no light pollution. 6.Easy to Instal, Just plug in and play.
